summary.name: PEP
summary.oneLiner: PEP is the premium protein drink for going out: refreshing, flavour-led, social, and made to feel good while having fun.
summary.positioningStatement: For socially active adults who want a better drink option when they are out, PEP is a premium protein drink that turns refreshment into a fun social ritual. Unlike gym-coded protein drinks or basic soft drinks, PEP leads with flavour, lightness, and occasion — with protein as a smart benefit that helps people feel good and have fun.
